name: publish-checklist
description: Example declarative extension that exposes local publishing readiness metadata and the built-in static publishing checklist surface.

permissions.reason: Reads publish-page frontmatter and Markdown checklist items from local notes.

contributes.label: Publishing checklist metadata
contributes.description: Identifies publish status, slugs, checklist items, and readiness signals.

contributes.label: Publish checklist
contributes.description: Declares a local publish checklist sidebar widget backed by Forge's static publishing workflow.
